title: touterea pumila
intro: Touterea pumila, also known as Dwarf Touterea, is a small shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. Touterea pumila is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system and promote healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its full potential.
